privacy.description: How Bosla collects, uses, and protects your personal data — account, payments, cookies, and your privacy rights.

terms.description: The terms that govern your use of Bosla, course purchases, licenses, and platform rules.

refunds.description: When and how you can request a refund for a course purchased on Bosla.

acceptance.title: Please review our updated legal documents
acceptance.description: We’ve updated the documents below. Please read the changes and accept the current versions to continue using Bosla.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Bosla team — support, business, and payment inquiries.
Contact.heroSubtitle: Questions about a course, an order, or the platform? Reach out and we'll get back to you.
Contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.responseTime: We aim to respond to every message within 1–2 business days.

1.question: How do I request a refund?
1.answer: Email our payments team from your account's registered address with your order reference — see our Refund Policy for the full eligibility window and process.

2.question: I can't access a course I purchased. What do I do?
2.answer: First check Dashboard → Orders & Billing to confirm the order shows as paid. If it does and the course still isn't accessible, contact support with your order reference and we'll resolve it quickly.

3.question: How do I get my certificate of completion?
3.answer: Certificates are issued automatically once you complete all lessons and pass any required quizzes in a course — you'll find them under your Dashboard.

4.question: Can I become an Instructor on Bosla?
4.answer: Yes — sign in, then apply from your Dashboard. Our team reviews every application and will follow up by email.

form.rateLimited: You're sending messages a bit too quickly — please wait a few minutes and try again.
form.spamRejected: We couldn't send your message — please review it and try again.
form.successDescription: Thanks for reaching out — we'll get back to you soon.

errors.messageTooLong: Message is too long — please shorten it to 5000 characters or fewer.
